title: epidendrum cochlidium
intro: Epidendrum cochlidium, also known as the 'Lizard's Tongue' or 'Dragon's Tongue Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Epidendrum cochlidium include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or teas, and it can also be found in the form of capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
